schedule 5 hours ago NEET / Biology
#PHY-NEET-2025-09
flag Flagged by 4 Students

Question Content

A circular coil of radius 10 cm, 500 turns and resistance 2 Ω is placed with its plane perpendicular to the horizontal component of the earth's magnetic field. It is rotated about its vertical diameter through 180° in 0.25 s. Estimate the magnitudes of the emf and current induced in the coil.

A

3.8 × 10⁻³ V, 1.9 × 10⁻³ A

B (CORRECT) check_circle

4.2 × 10⁻³ V, 2.1 × 10⁻³ A

C

5.1 × 10⁻³ V, 2.5 × 10⁻³ A

D

2.9 × 10⁻³ V, 1.4 × 10⁻³ A

Expert Explanation
